name: shadcn-svelte-extras

items.name: active
items.title: Active
items.description: Automatically add the `data-active` attribute to a link based on its active state. Active link detection, navigation state, route matching, and active link styling.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: An extended button component with loading states, promise handling, click handlers, variants, sizes, and disabled states for interactive UI elements.

items.name: chat
items.title: Chat
items.description: A component for creating live chats, messaging interfaces, conversation UIs, chat bubbles, message threads, and real-time communication displays.

items.name: code
items.title: Code
items.description: A code component for displaying syntax-highlighted code blocks, code snippets, programming code, source code, with line numbers, copy functionality, and code highlighting.

items.name: confirm-delete-dialog
items.title: ConfirmDeleteDialog
items.description: A dialog for confirming delete actions.

items.name: copy-button
items.title: CopyButton
items.description: A button used to copy text to the clipboard, copy code snippets, copy content, clipboard copy functionality with visual feedback and copy confirmation.

items.name: emoji-picker
items.title: EmojiPicker
items.description: A composable emoji picker component for selecting emojis, emoji selector, emoji chooser, emoji reactions, emoji input, with categories, search, and recent emojis.

items.name: field-set
items.title: FieldSet
items.description: A field set component for grouping form fields, form groups, input groups, form sections, with labels, descriptions, error states, and validation feedback.

items.name: file-drop-zone
items.title: FileDropZone
items.description: A file drop zone component for drag and drop file uploads, file uploader, file input, drag drop files, file selector, with preview, validation, and multiple file support.

items.name: image-cropper
items.title: ImageCropper
items.description: An image cropper component for cropping images, image editor, photo cropper, image resize, crop tool, with aspect ratio control, preview, and image upload.

items.name: ipv4address-input
items.title: Ipv4AddressInput
items.description: An IPv4 address input component for entering IP addresses, network addresses, IP input field, with validation, formatting, and octet separation.

items.name: is-mac
items.title: IsMac
items.description: Determine if the user is on a Mac. Platform detection, macOS detection, Mac OS detection, platform-specific UI, and Mac keyboard shortcuts.

items.name: language-switcher
items.title: LanguageSwitcher
items.description: A language switcher component for changing locales, i18n language selector, locale switcher, internationalization, translation switcher, and multi-language support.

items.name: light-switch
items.title: LightSwitch
items.description: A light switch component for toggling themes, dark mode toggle, light dark mode switcher, theme toggle button, with smooth animations and visual feedback.

items.name: link
items.title: Link
items.description: A link component for navigation, anchor links, hyperlinks, styled links, with variants, external link indicators, and active states.

items.name: meter
items.title: Meter
items.description: A meter component for displaying scalar measurements, value indicators, gauges, measurement displays, disk usage, storage capacity, with min max values and visual value indication.

items.name: modal
items.title: Modal
items.description: A modal component for dialogs, popups, overlays, dialog boxes, modal windows, with backdrop, close functionality, and responsive design.

items.name: nlp-date-input
items.title: NlpDateInput
items.description: A natural language processing date input component for parsing date strings, smart date input, date picker with NLP, text to date conversion, and date suggestions.

items.name: number-field
items.title: NumberField
items.description: A component for incrementing and decrementing a number.

items.name: password
items.title: Password
items.description: A password component for password input fields, secure password entry, password visibility toggle, password strength indicator, and secret input handling.

items.name: phone-input
items.title: PhoneInput
items.description: A phone number input component for telephone numbers, phone number form field, international phone input, country code selector, and phone validation.

items.name: pm-command
items.title: PmCommand
items.description: A package manager command component for displaying npm, pnpm, yarn, bun commands, install commands, package manager instructions, and copyable command snippets.

items.name: rename
items.title: Rename
items.description: A component for renaming files, folders, items, inline editing, editable text, rename input, with validation and keyboard shortcuts.

items.name: shortcut
items.title: Shortcut
items.description: Add keyboard shortcuts to your application. Keyboard shortcuts, hotkeys, key bindings, keyboard navigation, command shortcuts, and keyboard event handling.

items.name: snippet
items.title: Snippet
items.description: A snippet component for displaying code snippets, command snippets, text snippets, with copy functionality, variants, and multiline support.

items.name: star-rating
items.title: StarRating
items.description: A star rating component for ratings, reviews, star selector, 5 star rating, rating input, with half stars, readonly mode, custom colors, and sizes.

items.name: stepper
items.title: Stepper
items.description: A stepper component for multi-step forms, step navigation, progress indicators, wizard flows, step-by-step processes, with next/previous navigation and step validation.

items.name: tags-input
items.title: TagsInput
items.description: A tags input component for tag input fields, multi-tag input, tag selector, chip input, tag management, with add remove tags, and tag validation.

items.name: terminal
items.title: Terminal
items.description: A terminal component for displaying command line interfaces, terminal emulator, CLI display, shell terminal, code examples, with typing animation and command output.

items.name: theme-selector
items.title: ThemeSelector
items.description: A theme selector component for choosing themes, theme picker, color scheme selector, dark light theme switcher, with multiple theme options and visual preview.

items.name: toc
items.title: TableOfContents
items.description: A table of contents component for navigation, document outline, page navigation, TOC sidebar, with anchor links, active section highlighting, and scroll tracking.

items.name: tree-view
items.title: TreeView
items.description: A tree view component for displaying hierarchical data, file tree, folder structure, nested lists, directory tree, with expand collapse, custom icons, and selection.

items.name: underline-tabs
items.title: UnderlineTabs
items.description: A underline tabs component for displaying tabs, tab navigation, tab selection, tab navigation, and tab selection.

items.name: use-auto-scroll
items.title: UseAutoScroll
items.description: Automatically scroll to the bottom of an element when new content is added. Auto scroll, chat scroll, message scroll, scroll to bottom, and dynamic content scrolling.

items.name: use-boolean
items.title: UseBoolean
items.description: Simplify working with boolean values. Toggle state, boolean state management, true false toggle, boolean hook, and reactive boolean values.

items.name: use-clipboard
items.title: UseClipboard
items.description: Copy text to the users clipboard. Clipboard API, copy to clipboard, clipboard copy hook, copy functionality, and clipboard state management.

items.name: use-frecency
items.title: UseFrecency
items.description: Sort items based on how frequently and recent they were used. Frequency sorting, recency sorting, usage tracking, smart sorting, and item ranking.

items.name: use-media
items.title: UseMedia
items.description: Track the size of the screen using the standard Tailwind CSS breakpoints. Responsive breakpoints, media queries, screen size detection, mobile desktop detection, and responsive design hooks.

items.name: use-promise
items.title: UsePromise
items.description: Manage the state of a promise reactively in the absence of {#await}. Promise state management, async state, loading error success states, promise hook, and reactive promises.

items.name: use-ramp
items.title: UseRamp
items.description: Ramp a value up/down over time.

items.name: use-toc
items.title: UseToc
items.description: Generate a table of contents. TOC generation, document outline, heading extraction, navigation generation, and table of contents hook.

items.name: utils
items.description: Global utilities used by most of the components.

items.name: window
items.title: Window
items.description: A beautiful styled window component for windowed UI, desktop-style windows, window container, with title bar, close button, and customizable content area.

description: Turn key shadcn-svelte components to help finish your app.
